name: Maine Science Simulated Response Authoring Review Extract
population_or_context: Spring 2024 Maine Science Assessment; machine-scorable selected-response and technology-enhanced items scored in the ADAM test delivery platform for online and paper administration modalities.
sample_size: Not applicable; the passage describes item authoring/review QA rather than a study sample.
methods: Extracted Chapter 4, Section 4.1. The report states that item scoring rules are documented on test maps and verified during key-check validation, and that the item authoring/review process supports review of simulated student responses and machine-scored output.
education_context: State science summative assessment with selected-response, technology-enhanced, and constructed-response formats; the simulated-response passage concerns machine-scorable items in ADAM.
response_origin: Simulated student responses to machine-scorable assessment items, used during item authoring/review to inspect machine-scored output.
rubric_label_space: Rule-based item scores produced by ADAM using scoring rules and QTI-encoded response processing for machine-scorable interactions.
label_source: Expected machine-scored output is derived from item authoring, test maps, scoring rules, and key-check validation rather than independent human labels.
generation_model: Not applicable; no LLM or generation model is reported.
generation_method: Native item authoring/review workflow allows review of simulated student responses and corresponding machine-scored output; the report does not describe how simulated responses are authored.
evaluation_method: Quality control review verifies that item scoring rules are configured correctly and that items are properly machine scored when administered.
scorer_use: Simulated responses support rule-based machine-scoring QA in ADAM item authoring/review, not automated essay scoring training or validation.
real_response_comparator: No real-response comparator is reported for the simulated-response authoring/review workflow.
reported_metrics: No quantitative metrics are reported for the simulated-response review process.
limitations: The passage supports simulated-response review for rule-based machine-scored items, not LLM-generated response augmentation.
The passage does not establish final validation evidence, fairness evidence, or live-scoring performance evidence.
The report does not specify simulated-response counts, authorship procedures, or review criteria beyond item authoring/review QA.
